stemHtml: After refuelling at your destination, before the return trip, what should be checked on the FMS fuel pages?

options.a: That the volume/mass of the fuel on board is correct according to how much has been added.
options.b: That the fuel temperature is within acceptable limits.
options.c: That the fuel type is correctly recorded.
options.d: That the fuel in the tanks is the correct type/grade.
